title: Ze stealing is not as rewarding as ze Pwning (thief on TF2)
description:
I found this crook in a trade server.
He says that he can colour your hats for free, just give it to him.
He can't give you paint because he bought it. Smart, uh?

iSandvich is his friend, the "partner".

Wrangler's Steam Page (he changed name):
http://steamcommunity.com/id/roobinwalker/
As you can see, the link is the same of the steam page of Wrangler in the video.

iSandvich's Steam Page:
http://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198014621783

Wrangler's Friends Page (screened after the video):
http://i54.tinypic.com/2dt535j.jpg
As you can see, there is iSandvich in his friend list.



Thanks to ShadowtheKnuckles for the title!
